heading: Today
text: Patchy valley fog, then sunshine, mixed with a few clouds. A stray, late-day shower far northeast.  Highs in the 70s, near 80 in the warmer valleys.  Winds light, becoming northwest up to 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A stray evening shower far northeast, then clearing.  Some increasing clouds from the west after midnight.  Patches of valley fog late.  Lows in the 50s.  Winds light and variable.

heading: Thursday
text: Patches of fog early.  Periods of sun giving way to clouds.  A rising chance of showers through NY and the St. Lawrence Valley in the afternoon, spreading east through Quebec and into VT later in the day.  Highs in the 70s to a few low 80s.  Light winds, becoming south less than 10 mph.
